zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：高位震荡偏多蓄势延续
zh.content:
当前价格维持在69美元附近窄幅整理，整体结构呈高位震荡偏多格局，短线多头动能仍在延续，但上攻节奏略有放缓，市场进入蓄势阶段，多头占优延续

均线方面价格稳于20日均线上方，SMA20位于67.90附近提供支撑，MACD维持正值但信号线缺失，动能偏强但不充分，结构稳定

短期支撑关注67.80一线，若守稳有望再次上探69.50上方阻力，跌破则可能回踩67美元区域，建议低吸高抛控制仓位为主

整体市场波动收敛，资金情绪偏谨慎但未转弱，若放量突破将打开新一轮上涨空间，关注成交量确认方向变化短线为主谨慎操作布局策略

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana is currently trading in a tight consolidation range near 68.88 USD, showing limited volatility after a modest upward drift. The price structure remains mildly bullish as it holds above the 20-day simple moving average at 67.90. Recent candles indicate equilibrium between buyers and sellers, with repeated tests near the session high suggesting potential accumulation rather than distribution. Momentum appears stable, not yet extended.

Momentum indicators show a cautiously constructive setup. The MACD value at 0.485 suggests positive momentum, though confirmation is limited due to missing signal line data. RSI is unavailable, reducing clarity on overbought or oversold conditions. Price remains above the 20-day SMA, reinforcing a short-term bullish bias. However, the lack of oscillator confirmation implies momentum strength is moderate rather than decisive.

Immediate resistance is located near the intraday high at 69.15 USD, which has repeatedly capped upward moves. A break above this level could open a path toward the psychological 70.00 zone. On the downside, initial support sits at 68.82, followed closely by the 20-day SMA near 67.90, which acts as a dynamic support zone. A loss of this area would weaken short-term structure.

Trading conditions favor range-bound strategies until a clear breakout occurs. Short-term traders may consider buying near support around 68.80–67.90 with tight risk management below the SMA. Conversely, breakout traders can wait for a confirmed move above 69.15 before targeting 70 and beyond. Volume confirmation would strengthen conviction in either direction. Until then, disciplined position sizing and avoidance of over-leverage are advisable overall outlook.
